title: NXR Timeseries (on-disk, type-agnostic)
description: A generic time-varying signal. The defining attribute is the time axis (sfreq + n_samples + origin_sec); the non-time dimensions are unconstrained (channels, vertices, or none). `kind` tags the semantic interpretation (sensor, source, ...) for the application; nxr-io reads it agnostically. Time is the LAST axis. There is no stored times array — the time vector is derived from attributes.

dims.K: non-time element count (channels, vertices, ...); may be absent for a single trace

kind.description: Semantic tag, e.g. 'sensor' or 'source'. Interpreted by the application, not nxr-io.

axes.description: Dimension names; the LAST must be 'time'. E.g. ['channel','time'] or ['vertex','time'].

metadata_ref.description: Optional path to a metadata group for this kind, e.g. 'sensors'.

data.description: Signal values; time is the LAST axis. Time-windowed chunking (~few seconds per chunk) for streaming.
